title: 5 V input with a 3.3 V regulated rail
prompt: My ESP32-C3 project runs from a 5 V input but the ESP32 and its sensors need 3.3 V. Regulate the 5 V down to a 3.3 V rail, power the ESP32-C3 from 3.3 V, and add a decoupling capacitor on the 3.3 V rail near the chip. Keep the raw 5 V available too. For the bench check confirm the 3.3 V rail.
